name: IQVIA Healthcare Intelligence API
what_it_does: IQVIA Healthcare Intelligence REST API for pharmaceutical and healthcare analytics data platform. Enables AI agents to manage real-world evidence (RWE) data access and patient claims analytics, handle pharmaceutical market data and prescription tracking retrieval, access healthcare professional (HCP) engagement and targeting data, retrieve clinical trial data and site intelligence analytics, manage patient journey and treatment pathway analytics, handle competitive intelligence and market share data for pharma brands, access IQVIA Longitudinal Prescription (LRx) and medical claims data, retrieve health economics and outcomes research (HEOR) data, manage contract research organization (CRO) operational data, and integrate IQVIA analytics with CRM, market access, and medical affairs platforms.
use_cases: Accessing real-world evidence from clinical research agents
Retrieving prescription market data from pharma commercial agents
Analyzing patient treatment pathways from medical affairs agents
Integrating market intelligence with CRM from commercial operations agents
not_for: Consumer healthcare apps without enterprise pharma data licensing
Clinical trial management without IQVIA data partnership
General analytics without pharmaceutical market intelligence requirements
best_when: A pharmaceutical or life sciences company using IQVIA wants AI agents to automate real-world evidence access, prescription data analytics, HCP targeting, market intelligence retrieval, and commercial operations integration.
avoid_when: LEGAL+PRIVACY RISK: IQVIA claims data is de-identified but re-identification risks exist for rare disease populations — implement appropriate data use restrictions. HIPAA safe harbor de-identification requirements must be verified for any downstream use of claims data. HCP data usage must comply with applicable marketing and data privacy laws by country.

auth.notes: IQVIA uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. Enterprise account with data license scoping. IQVIA OCEANS API framework for programmatic data access. Data Use Agreements (DUA) required for claims and real-world data. Custom data delivery for large datasets. IQVIA One Platform for unified analytics access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — data licensing agreements required; significant annual investment
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual data license agreements; per-dataset or enterprise platform pricing
pricing.notes: Durham, North Carolina. IQVIA Holdings Inc. NYSE: IQV. Founded 2016 (IMS Health + Quintiles merger). $14B+ annual revenue. Healthcare data and CRO market leader. 100+ countries coverage. 900M+ patient records (de-identified). Largest pharmaceutical data company globally. Competes with Symphony Health and Optum for pharma analytics.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API account; large dataset queries are async; data delivery for bulk exports

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL+PRIVACY RISK: Claims data de-identification — verify HIPAA safe harbor compliance for downstream use; rare disease data may be re-identifiable
Data Use Agreement required — IQVIA data licensing requires DUA; automation must operate within DUA-permitted use cases
Complex data licensing — each IQVIA dataset (LRx, LMx, PHAST, etc.) has separate licensing; verify access before querying
Documentation limited publicly — IQVIA API documentation requires customer relationship; limited public API documentation available
Async data delivery — large dataset queries are async with delivery to cloud storage; automation must handle async job patterns
HCP marketing compliance — HCP data usage for commercial purposes must comply with applicable laws per country; requires legal review
agent_readiness.security_notes: Healthcare analytics. SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. De-identified claims and pharmaceutical data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Pharmaceutical data. SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. De-identified healthcare analytics data.
